CTN 4, 014 [Enuma Anu Enlil 06][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
Column i
(1 column missing)
Column ii
(start of column missing)
o ii 1'o 1'

[...] x x x GUB LUGAL-MEŠ ⸢ša₂ KUR DU₃⸣.[A.BI]

(o ii 1') [...] ... stands (there): the kings of the lands, all of them, will bring about enmity.

o ii 2'2'

[NAM].KUR₂ GAR-⸢MEŠ⸣

o ii 3'3'

[*] ⸢mul⸣šu-ku-du ina ŠA₃ SI-MEŠ-šu₂ GUB ŠU.BI.AŠ.A.AN<(LUGAL-MEŠ)> ša₂ KUR DU₃.A.BI MUNUS.KUR₂ GAR-MEŠ

(o ii 3') (If) the Arrow stands inside its (the Moon's) horns: ditto (the kings of the lands, all of them, will bring about enmity). There will be barley and straw in the land.

o ii 4'4'

ŠE u₃ IN.NU ina KUR GAL₂

o ii 5'5'

* mulšu-ku-du ina MAŠ.SILA₃-šu₂ GUB A.RA₂ ⸢KUR⸣ DU₃.⸢A⸣.[BI] KU₅ ⸢ina⸣ [...]

(o ii 5') (If) the Arrow stands in its (the Moon's) flank: the ways of the land, all of it, will be cut off. In [...] will bring about enmity.

o ii 6'6'

NAM.KUR₂ ⸢GAR-MEŠ⸣

o ii 7'7'

* mulšu-ku-du ina bi-rit SI-MEŠ-šu₂ GUB IRI ša₂ BAD₃-šu₂ dan-[nu]

(o ii 7') (If) the Arrow stands in between its (the Moon's) horns: a city whose wall is strong - its lord will demolish it.

o ii 8'8'

EN-šu₂ ina-qar-⸢šu⸣

o ii 9'9'

* mulšu-ku-du ina SI ZA₃-šu₂ GUB LUGAL ELAM.MA ARAD-MEŠ-šu

(o ii 9') (If) the Arrow stands in its right horn: the king of Elam - his slaves will kill him in a rebellion.

o ii 10'10'

ina <ḪI>.GAR ⸢GAZ⸣-[MEŠ]-šu

o ii 11'11'

* mulšu-ku-du ina SI GUB₃-šu₂ GUB LUGAL ⸢URIki⸣ LUGAL ⸢MAR⸣.[TUki]

(o ii 11') (If) the Arrow stands in its left horn: the king of Akkad will bring about enmity (with) the king of Amurru.

o ii 12'12'

KUR₂.KUR₂ [GAR]an

o ii 13'13'

* 30 ina IGI-šu₂ mulGIR₂.TAB GIM ⸢TUR₃ NIGIN-šu₂ UR⸣.A-ME u ⸢UR⸣.[BAR.RA-MEŠ IDIM]-MEŠ

(o ii 13') (If) the Scorpion surrounds the Moon at its appearance like a lunar halo: lions and wolves will go wild (gloss: in between the Arrow [...]). The ways will be blocked (or): the kings of the lands, all of them, will become hostile (to each other).

o ii 14'14'

ina bi-rit mul[GIR₂.TAB ...]

o ii 15'15'

A.RA₂ KU₅-ME : LUGAL-⸢ME KUR DU₃⸣.A.⸢BI⸣ KUR₂-MEŠ

o ii 16'16'

* mulGIR₂.TAB ina ŠA₃-šu₂ GUB ILLU DU-ma A.MAḪ-MEŠ KU₅-MEŠ

(o ii 16') (If) the Scorpion stands inside it (the Moon): a flood will flow and cuttings will be blocked.

o ii 17'17'

* ⸢mul⸣GIR₂.TAB ina MAŠ.SILA₃-šu₂ GUB ina MU BI ⸢PEŠ₂⸣.GIŠ.GI.⸢GU₇.E⸣

(o ii 17') (If) the Scorpion stands in its flank: in that year (there will be) rodents. Rising of Elam. Sesame, date palms, and dates will ... (or): he/it will gather. Alternatively, together the way of the land will be blocked.

o ii 18'18'

⸢ZI kur⸣ELAM.MA ŠE.[GIŠ.I₃ giš]⸢GIŠIMMAR⸣ u₃ ⸢ZU₂⸣.LUM.MA x-MEŠ

o ii 19'19'

: ⸢i-kaṣ₃⸣-ṣa-⸢ar₃⸣ KI.⸢MIN⸣ A.RA₂ TEŠ₂.BI ina KUR KU₅as

o ii 20'20'

* mulGIR₂.TAB ina SI ZA₃-šu₂ GUB ina MU BI BURU₅-ḪI.A ZI-ma ⸢BURU₁₄ KUR GU₇⸣

(o ii 20') (If) the Scorpion stands in its right horn in that year locusts will swarm and devour the harvest of the land. Alternatively, the king of Elam - in that year they will kill him.

o ii 21'21'

KI.MIN LUGAL ELAM.MAki ina MU BI GAZ-MEŠ-šu₂

o ii 22'22'

* mulGIR₂.TAB ina SI GUB₃-šu₂ GUB ina MU BI BURU₅-ḪI.A ZI-⸢ma⸣

(o ii 22') (If) the Scorpion stands in its left horn: in that year locusts will swarm and devour date palms (or): in the left of the land. Alternatively, the king of Akkad and the king of Amurru will bring about enmity (with one another) (or): battle (and) weapons.

o ii 23'23'

gišGIŠIMMAR : ina GUB₃ KUR GU₇ KI.MIN LUGAL ⸢URI⸣ki u₃ LUGAL ⸢MAR⸣.[TUki]

o ii 24'24'

NAM.KUR₂ GAR-MEŠ : ME₃ ⸢ŠITA₂⸣

o ii 25'25'

* mul⸢GIR₂⸣.TAB ana IGI-šu₂ GUB KUR in-neš-⸢ši⸣

(o ii 25') (If) the Scorpion stands in front of it: the land will become confused.

o ii 26'26'

* KUN mulGIR₂.TAB GIM TUR₃ NIGIN-šu₂ ina MU BI ZIut EREN₂—man-[da]

(o ii 26') (If) the Scorpion's tail surrounds it like a lunar halo: in that year: attack of the Umman-manda (gloss: ...) [...] against Akkad.

o ii 27'27'

: x x : ana kurURIki x [...]

o ii 28'28'

* 30 ina IGI-šu₂ ⸢mul⸣UDU.IDIM ina ŠA₃-šu₂ GUB ina MU BI ina KUR [...]

(o ii 28') (If) a planet stands inside the Moon at its appearance: in that year deaths will take place in the land [...]. Cultivated fields of the land [...].

o ii 29'29'

UŠ₂-MEŠ GAR-MEŠ me-reš KUR [...]

o ii 30'30'

* ⸢mul⸣UDU.IDIM ana IGI-šu₂ GUB KUR muš-ke-⸢nu⸣-[tu₂ ...]

(o ii 30') (If) a planet stands in front of it: the land [...] poverty and its property [...].

o ii 31'31'

u₃ ⸢mar⸣-[ši]-⸢is⸣-sa [...]
